$comment: Task #647 — Curated sample report gallery. Each entry powers a card on /gallery and click-through opens /results/<reportId>. Display fields (title, snippet, score, signals, label) are stub-rendered on the card so the gallery is self-contained without DB lookups; the reportId points at one of the 6 seed reports inserted by `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server seed` so click-through resolves in any environment that has been seeded. Edit this file (and bump the version when shipping changes) — there is no admin UI.

samples.label: obvious_slop
samples.title: Comprehensive Security Analysis of Authentication System
samples.snippet: It is important to note that in today's digital landscape, robust security measures are paramount. The authentication mechanism represents a significant area of concern…

samples.label: obvious_slop
samples.title: Multiple potential vulnerabilities in login flow
samples.snippet: The login page might be vulnerable to attacks. Passwords could potentially be weak. The session management system leveraging this could lead to unauthorized access…

samples.label: obvious_slop
samples.title: Holistic review of platform security posture
samples.snippet: Certainly! Here is a comprehensive overview. It bears mentioning that proactive measures should be taken to ensure robust security across the platform…

samples.label: subtle_slop
samples.title: Stored XSS in profile bio (no working PoC)
samples.snippet: Vulnerability appears in /api/v2/users/profile. An attacker could inject script tags. Output encoding is reportedly missing on the profile page…

samples.label: subtle_slop
samples.title: SSRF in webhook handler — references nonexistent CVE
samples.snippet: Cites CVE-2024-XXXXX as the upstream root cause. Pattern matches a real bug class (DNS rebinding) but the cited identifier does not resolve…

samples.label: subtle_slop
samples.title: IDOR in invoice download — overstated CVSS
samples.snippet: Reports a real-looking IDOR but inflates impact to CVSS 9.8 with claims of full database compromise unsupported by the proof-of-concept shown…

samples.label: borderline
samples.title: Terse race-condition note — light on prose, real bug
samples.snippet: TOCTOU on POST /api/transfers. Concurrent curl loop drains balance past zero. Suspect missing SELECT FOR UPDATE in HandleTransfer()…

samples.label: borderline
samples.title: SQLi triage from a templated bounty submission
samples.snippet: Looks templated (boilerplate Summary / Affected / PoC / Impact headings) but the payload, response excerpt and root-cause snippet are all genuine…

samples.label: borderline
samples.title: XSS report with strong PoC but hedging conclusion
samples.snippet: Solid payload and CSP analysis up front, then drifts into a hedging conclusion ("this could potentially be leveraged…") that pulls the score upward…

samples.label: clean
samples.title: Stored XSS in user profile — clean human report
samples.snippet: Concrete payload, file path /src/components/UserProfile.tsx, CWE-79, CVSS 8.1, observed-vs-expected behaviour and a remediation pointing at DOMPurify…

samples.label: clean
samples.title: IDOR in invoice download — clean human report
samples.snippet: Two-request PoC, exact endpoint, code snippet showing the missing ownership check, CWE-639 + CVSS 7.5, and a row-level-security remediation…

samples.label: clean
samples.title: SQL injection in product search — clean human report
samples.snippet: UNION-based and time-based payloads, vulnerable Python snippet, CWE-89 + CVSS 9.8, parameterised-query fix shown verbatim…
